creator: ghislain@smartix.llc
text:
(In reply to PauAmma from comment #6)

Well yes and no. Considering the fact that everyone is free to use the article that best fits the situation, this matter is really solved at the individual ( personal) level. But in a more general sense, this remains an opened question. 

Full Reference: https://www.merriam-webster.com/words-at-play/is-it-a-or-an
